message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
participant "BeanShellExtension" as BeanShellExtension
participant "BeanShellExtensionUI" as BeanShellExtensionUI
participant "BeanShellMenu" as BeanShellMenu
participant "BeanShellMacroAction" as BeanShellMacroAction
participant "BeanShellMacrosUI" as BeanShellMacrosUI
participant "BeanShellMacroController" as BeanShellMacroController
participant "BSInterpreter" as BSInterpreter

User -> BeanShellExtension : openBSext()
activate BeanShellExtension
BeanShellExtension -> BeanShellExtensionUI : create(this, uicontroller)
activate BeanShellExtensionUI
BeanShellExtensionUI -> BeanShellMenu : openBSmenu(uicontroller)
activate BeanShellMenu
BeanShellMenu -> BeanShellMacroAction : open(uicontroller)
activate BeanShellMacroAction
BeanShellMacroAction -> BeanShellMacrosUI : create()
activate BeanShellMacrosUI
BeanShellMacrosUI -> BeanShellMacroController : create()
activate BeanShellMacroController
BeanShellMacroController -> BSInterpreter : create()
activate BSInterpreter

User -> BeanShellMacrosUI : write expressions
User -> BeanShellMacrosUI : execute expressions
BeanShellMacrosUI -> BeanShellMacroController : getInterpreter().executeMacro(exp.toString());

deactivate BSInterpreter
deactivate BeanShellMacroController
deactivate BeanShellMacrosUI
deactivate BeanShellMacroAction
deactivate BeanShellMenu
deactivate BeanShellExtensionUI
deactivate BeanShellExtension

@enduml
```
